name: Coder
pricing_notes: Open source self-hosted free; Coder Cloud $22/user/mo; Enterprise custom

auth.notes: API tokens from Coder dashboard; OAuth2 for workspace session auth

performance.notes: Workspace provisioning 1-5min (Terraform-based); IDE connection ~200ms after workspace start

agent_readiness.notes: Self-hosted remote development environments via Terraform templates. REST API for workspace lifecycle (create, start, stop, delete). VS Code Server + JetBrains + terminal support. Kubernetes-native. Good for programmatic sandbox provisioning for agents.

gotchas: Terraform knowledge required for workspace templates
API less developer-friendly than cloud-native alternatives
Go-primary codebase — Python bindings via REST API
best_when: Enterprises needing self-hosted dev environments with full control
Agents that need to provision isolated code execution environments on-demand
Teams wanting Gitpod/GitHub Codespaces alternative with self-hosting
Security-sensitive organizations that can't use cloud dev environments
avoid_when: Simple container execution (E2B or Modal simpler)
Need instant workspace startup (Terraform provisioning adds time)
summary: Coder provides self-hosted remote development environments via Terraform-defined workspace templates. REST API for workspace lifecycle management. Supports VS Code Server, JetBrains, and terminal. Kubernetes-native deployment. Best for enterprises needing self-hosted Gitpod/Codespaces alternative or agents that need to provision isolated development environments programmatically.
